description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The aircraft features multiple passenger windows along the sides, a forward-mounted enclosed cockpit with a clear windshield, and a conventional tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. Four turbofan engines are mounted under the wings, two on each side, and the landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, indicating a tricycle configuration. The surface is predominantly light gray, with subtle panel lines and minimal external markings. The overall design suggests a focus on passenger transport and efficient aerodynamics.
description: A sleek, light gray commercial jet airplane with swept-back low wings, four underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. Features include a forward cockpit, passenger windows, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full wingspan, tail assembly, and the four underwing engines.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the passenger windows, cockpit, and landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with clear visibility of the tail and wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple windshield panels.
